series_metadata.series_description: Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) Construction Over-site documentation including compliance reports and documents associated with Affirmative Action Program requirements; rules and regulations contained in OAC 123:2-1-01, OAC 123:2-3 through 123:2-9; OAC 123:2-9-01 - Monthly Utilization Work Hour (I-29) Reports.
